# llms-full.txt — Full AI crawler guide for aims-sg.com

## Company
- Name: AIMS SG
- URL: https://aims-sg.com
- Email: hello@aims-sg.com
- Location: Singapore
- Tagline: Agentic AI Business Transformation for Singapore SMEs

## Services
1. Agentic AI Audit — Free diagnostics identifying manual workflows ready for autonomous AI workers.
2. Multi-Agent System Scoping — Architecture layout, single- vs multi-agent planning, and LLM selection.
3. Custom Agent Development — Build, integrate, and deploy autonomous agents with corporate APIs and databases.
4. Grant Navigation — Aligning development scopes to EDG and PSG criteria for up to 50-70% co-funding.
5. Agent Fleet Monitoring & Training — Security guardrails, monitoring dashboards, and team upskilling.

## Target audience
Singapore SME and enterprise decision-makers

## Pricing model
Project-based development and retainer support. Free initial Agentic Audit.

## Differentiators
- Execution-Level Focus: We build execution-level agents (with loops, tool-calling, memory), not just text boxes.
- Singapore-specific: Deep knowledge of PSG/EDG application compliance, local data regulations, and SME workflows.
- Guardrailed & Safe: Custom-built human-in-the-loop interfaces ensuring agents only take actions they are authorized to do.

## Key statistics
- Singapore's National AI Impact Programme targets 10,000 SMEs over 3 years.
- PSG Grant covers up to 50% of AI solution costs ($30,000 cap).
- EDG Grant covers up to 70% of custom development projects for eligible local SMEs.
- AI referral traffic grew 527% year-over-year.
- AI-referred visitors convert at ~15.9% vs Google organic at ~1.76%.
